Description: Draft feature for honoring N-per-day and M-total limits while reusing unused capacity from quieter days.

Stories.StoryDescription: Choose the deterministic strategy for reallocating unused day quota to stronger days.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: A documented algorithm exists for reallocating per-day quota under a total cap.

Stories.StoryDescription: Apply the quota algorithm to produce the final album selection across all days.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The selection pass respects per-day and trip-wide limits while reallocating unused capacity.
